def negative_service_raises_or_catches_http_exception_type():
    rule_id = "service_raises_or_catches_http_exception_type"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Service-layer function raises or catches HTTP exception types that belong to the transport layer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
